name: myorbisagents-remotion
description: MyOrbisAgents explainer + marketing video suite (Remotion). Standalone — not part of the pnpm workspace.

scripts.render:all: remotion render Explainer out/explainer.mp4 && remotion render TwoMinute out/two-minute.mp4 && remotion render FounderStory out/founder.mp4 && remotion render HomepageHero out/homepage.mp4
